raw_consumer_statement:
I am making this complaint becasue I called American express Credit card to make dispute for the tickets I paid through American Express Travel, the credit card department did not make the dispute for me, they always reansffred me to their travel department and put me on hold for long time, no body was able to give me any answer nor results at all. 
I booked a round-trip flight on the American Express Travel website . The trip information is as follows : XX/XX/XXXX to XX/XX/XXXX from XXXX XXXX ( XXXX  ) to XXXX, with XXXX XXXX. However, on XX/XX/XXXX, I missed my first flight. Consequently, I called the American Express Travel customer service line at XXXX XXXX  on XX/XX/XXXX to seek assistance. I informed the agent about missing my first flight from XXXX to XXXX and asked for guidance on what I should do next. 
The agent promptly arranged a new one-way flight for me with XXXX XXXX and I had to pay for that new one way flight to XXXX XXXX XXXX And The she assured me that I could still use my returning flight when I arrived in XXXX. Unfortunately, she neglected to inform me about the necessary steps to retain my returning flight, which I had already paid for with XXXX XXXX. Instead, she only asked me to pay for the new one-way flight from XXXX to XXXX. Additionally, she failed to inform XXXX XXXX about my change in plans, resulting in the cancellation of my returning flight. 

It's imperative that I receive a refund because the American Express Travel agent did not fulfill her responsibilities properly when I missed my flight, which I had booked through their service.
